query:
SELECT
                p.id AS "post_id!",
                COUNT(r.id) AS "report_count!",
                (p.hidden_at IS NOT NULL) AS "hidden!",
                p.area AS "area!"
            FROM posts p
            JOIN post_reports r ON r.post_id = p.id
            GROUP BY p.id
            ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC, p.id
            LIMIT $1
